  Log:
  fcitx-sunpinyin provides SunPinyin, a statistical language model based
  input method engine, as a back-end to the Fcitx IM server.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/fcitx/
  
  PR:             ports/162466
  Submitted by:   maintainer (Zhihao Yuan)
  Feature safe:   yes
